description: Merge the Sentinel-2 Red band (/home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_B04_red.tif) and NIR band (/home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_B08_nir.tif) into a single product. Scale the values from the original 0-4000 range to a 0-255 range and cast the data type to 8-bit unsigned integers (uint8). The final product must contain only these two optimized 8-bit bands, with the original high-bit-depth bands removed. Save the result as a BEAM-DIMAP file to /home/ga/snap_exports/dl_input_8bit.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/dl_input_8bit.tif.
